name: Bitpaidio
report: The attacker exploited the Lock_Token() function, which failed to properly update the lock timestamps. When a user already had an existing lock, the function incorrectly reused the old `start_time` and `end_time` from their previous lock record instead of resetting them to the current block timestamp and a new 180-day period. This logic flaw allowed the attacker to repeatedly lock tokens without actually extending the lock duration, potentially enabling premature withdrawal.
